overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person walk through Los Santos International Airport exterior and covered terminal walkway. The scene features modern airport architecture with distinctive red and purple illuminated towers, transitioning from outdoor landscaped areas to a blue-lit interior concourse with airline check-in counters.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport terminal exterior with landscaped walkways and approach road

events.description: black sedan drives past on the adjacent road to the left
entering the covered terminal walkway from the outdoor area

agents.ego_description: walking along the landscaped sidewalk approaching the airport terminal entrance

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the road parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: modern curved roof structure with illuminated grid-pattern facade and glass walls
tall airport towers with distinctive red and purple lighting visible against night sky
well-maintained hedge rows lining the pedestrian walkway
tropical palm trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along the outdoor airport approach at night, passing landscaped hedges with the modern terminal building on the right and colorful illuminated towers in the distance. A black sedan drives past on the adjacent road as the camera approaches the terminal entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered airport terminal concourse with airline check-in counters and blue accent lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts to blue neon tones under the covered walkway
pedestrians appear ahead walking through the concourse

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered terminal concourse passing illuminated advertisements and airline check-in counters

notable_agents.action: person in light clothing walking ahead in the same direction through the concourse

entered.detail: overhead concrete roof structure with blue neon accent lighting and linear fixtures
illuminated posters including red eCola soda advertisement and green car rental ad
Caipira and Air Herler airline service desks with illuminated hanging signage
large concrete pillars with terminal section numbers and blue lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving through the covered terminal walkway illuminated by blue neon lighting, passing illuminated advertising posters on the right wall. The concourse features airline check-in counters for Caipira and Air Herler, with pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction. Large support columns line the left side of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dark, landscaped exterior of an airport approach into the neon-lit interior of a terminal walkway. It begins by walking past manicured hedges with the modern terminal building to the right and colorful illuminated towers glowing in the distance. As a black sedan drives past on the adjacent road, the camera advances toward the terminal entrance, transitioning from the open night air into a covered concourse. The scene then shifts into a space dominated by blue neon lighting, passing large support columns and illuminated advertising posters on the right wall. Finally, the movement continues past airline check-in counters for Caipira and Air Herler, following pedestrians deeper into the blue-lit interior.
